Overrides.Override: +1 to Level of all non-Exceptional Support Gems Limited to 1 Runegraft of Gemcraft
Attacks have 5% chance to cause Bleeding

Skill.source: Item:2:Hands of the High Templar, Crusader Gloves

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Mind Butcher Reaver Axe Unique ID: 8abbc860d92e9fd26db5239c88236027fdb80db1d9781b36e053d1711dc9d393 Elder Item Item Level: 84 Quality: 28 Sockets: B-R-R LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 1 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Physical Modifier magnitudes 193% increased Physical Damage +18% to Damage over Time Multiplier Adds 28 to 47 Physical Damage 25% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit +63% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding from Hits with this Weapon Hits with this Weapon have Culling Strike against Bleeding Enemies {crafted}20% increased Attack Speed

Rarity: UNIQUE Hands of the High Templar Crusader Gloves Armour: 489 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.952 Energy Shield: 99 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.9887 Unique ID: c49293cb573abe38a8a195d47654a9153d0aeb28fd5831374bb5733b402078d9 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-R-R LevelReq: 66 Implicits: 3 +1 to Level of Socketed Gems +1 to Maximum Frenzy Charges Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Hit Can be modified while Corrupted Can have up to 5 Implicit Modifiers while Item has this Modifier 195% increased Armour and Energy Shield 12% increased maximum Life +27% to Fire and Lightning Resistances Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Usurper's Penance Eternal Burgonet Armour: 769 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.2329 Unique ID: caada2551591b4fea8397c9f52fcf8d975697e72d20cbe9f212bee5bb3ede8e5 Item Level: 70 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-R LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 1 Socketed Skill Gems get a 80% Cost & Reservation Multiplier 66% increased Armour Attacks have 15% chance to cause Bleeding 50% reduced Light Radius +4% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding per Frenzy Charge Bleeding you inflict deals Damage 4% faster per Frenzy Charge 28% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Critical Strike at Close Range Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Farrul's Fur Triumphant Lamellar Armour: 1352 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.965 Evasion: 1700 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.9719 Unique ID: 96611f93a14fb4213ade79331410dd9e9c0cf1c40744b9140e56e53de724dd96 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-G-R-R-R LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 1 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Defence Modifier magnitudes 159% increased Armour and Evasion +99 to maximum Life +2.00 seconds to Cat's Agility Duration Aspect of the Cat has no Reservation Gain up to your maximum number of Frenzy and Endurance Charges when you gain Cat's Agility You have Onslaught while you have Cat's Agility

Rarity: UNIQUE Svalinn Girded Tower Shield Armour: 523 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.9708 Ward: 176 WardBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: fc2e515bd40e3655e194bfbb66777086a38dad4e74822b23063c007dc8b775a8 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-B LevelReq: 51 Implicits: 1 +20 to maximum Life 15% Chance to Block Spell Damage +147 to Ward -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage -10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage Chance to Block is Lucky Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown

Rarity: UNIQUE Olesya's Delight Cloth Belt Unique ID: d2e4704629878b7613ccdf4440692dca2dfd31fc1cb1922f1ca5c8c5565d16fe Item Level: 86 LevelReq: 16 Implicits: 1 10% increased Movement Speed during any Flask Effect +694 to Evasion Rating +43% to Cold Resistance 12% increased Movement Speed +1 to Maximum Frenzy Charges Modifiers to Minimum Frenzy Charges instead apply to Minimum Affliction Charges Maximum Affliction Charges is equal to Maximum Frenzy Charges Gain Affliction Charges instead of Frenzy Charges Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Bottled Faith Sulphur Flask Unique ID: 90bfa751aa12b9d0eadc8988947f99a588edb149d91b52bc5acd58adafbde5c6 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full Creates Consecrated Ground on Use 15% reduced Duration Consecrated Ground created by this Flask has Tripled Radius Consecrated Ground created during Effect applies 10% increased Damage taken to Enemies 105% increased Critical Strike Chance against Enemies on Consecrated Ground during Effect
